name: Caramel Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt caramels with water and margarine in a saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir occasionally until smooth.
3. Combine sugar, salt, and eggs. Gradually add caramel sauce; mix well.
4. Stir in pecan halves and pour into pastry shell.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 40 minutes. Pie filling will appear soft, but becomes firm as it cools.
